title: Pink Honey Mexican Peach Stir-fry
description: A herbal, juicy, indulgent mexican dish featuring pink food colouring for a bright pop of color, infused with the flavors of tadka and served as an appetizer or snack.
instructions: Prepare the peach slices by removing any pits and trimming the stem.
In a small bowl, mix together all-purpose flour, pink food coloring, and enough water to create a thin batter for the peaches.
Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Once hot, add peach slices coated with the batter mixture and fry until golden brown on both sides.
In another pan, toast cumin seeds until they become fragrant, then add chili powder and paprika to create a tadka flavor profile.
Fold the cooked peaches into the tadka pan along with a few drops of garam masala, ensuring all pieces are coated in the aromatic mix.
Serve hot as an appetizer or snack.
